sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81329" key="peri/erktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περίερκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n81329.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enclosed</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κάνναισι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">63</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
